= dbContext;\n+        }\n+\n+        protected IActionResult ValidateEntity(object entity)\n+        {\n+            var validationResults = new List<ValidationResult>();\n+            var validationContext = new ValidationContext(entity);\n+\n+            if (Validator.TryValidateObject(entity, validationContext, validationResults, true))\n+            {\n+                return Ok();\n+            }\n+\n+            foreach (var validationResult in validationResults)\n+            {\n+                var memberNames = validationResult.MemberNames.Any()\n+                    ? validationResult.MemberNames\n+                    : new[] { string.Empty };\n+\n+                foreach (var memberName in memberNames)\n+                {\n+                    ModelState.AddModelError(memberName, validationResult.ErrorMessage ?? \"Validation failed.\");\n+                }\n+            }\n+\n+            return ValidationProblem(ModelState);\n+        }\n+\n+        protected IActionResult RelatedEntityNotFound(string fieldName, string message)\n+        {\n+            ModelState.AddModelError(fieldName, message);\n+            return
